1466:         outputBundle: {
1467:           bytes: outputBundle.bytes,
1468:           sha256: outputBundle.sha256,
1469:         },
1470:       });
1471:     } catch (error) {
1472:       const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
1473:       if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1474:         throw new QueueRetryError('Provider create deployment request is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1475:       }
1476:       throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1477:     }
1478:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
1479:       workspaceId,
1480:       providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1481:     });
1482:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1483:       workspaceId,
1484:       deploymentId,
1485:       eventType: 'deployment_provider_created',
1486:       payload: {
1487:         provider: publishOptions.provider,
1488:         providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1489:         status: createResult.status,
1490:         deployedUrl: createResult.deployedUrl,
1491:         outputDir: providerOutputDir,
1492:       },
1493:     });
1494:   }
1495: 
1496:   let providerStatus: WorkspaceDeployStatusResult = {
1497:     status: createResult.status,
1498:     deployedUrl: createResult.deployedUrl,
1499:   };
1500:   let cancelAttempted = false;
1501:   let cancelAccepted = false;
1502:   const maxPollAttempts = parseIntegerString(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER_MAX_POLLS, 120, 1, 600);
1503:   const pollIntervalMs = parseIntegerString(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER_POLL_INTERVAL_MS, 1500, 50, 10000);
1504:   for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maxPollAttempts; attempt += 1) {
1505:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId).catch(async (error) => {
1506:         if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError) {
1507:           if (!cancelAttempted) {
1508:             cancelAttempted = true;
1509:             let cancel;
1510:             try {
1511:               cancel = await provider.cancelDeployment(createResult.providerDeploymentId);
1512:             } catch (providerCancelError) {
1513:               const providerError = normalizeProviderError(providerCancelError);
1514:               if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1515:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Provider cancel status is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1516:               }
1517:               throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1518:             }
1519:             cancelAccepted = cancel.accepted;
1520:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1521:               workspaceId,
1522:             deploymentId,
1523:             eventType: 'deployment_provider_cancel_requested',
1524:             payload: {
1525:               providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1526:               accepted: cancel.accepted,
1527:               },
1528:             });
1529:             if (!cancel.accepted) {
1530:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1531:                 workspaceId,
1532:                 deploymentId,
1533:                 eventType: 'deployment_cancel_rejected',
1534:                 payload: {
1535:                   providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1536:                   duringPolling: true,
1537:                 },
1538:               });
1539:             }
1540:           }
1541:           if (cancelAccepted) {
1542:             return;
1543:           }
1544:         return;
1545:       }
1546:       throw error;
1547:     });
1548: 
1549:     if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded' || providerStatus.status === 'failed' || providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1550:       break;
1551:     }
1552: 
1553:     await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, pollIntervalMs));
1554:     try {
1555:       providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(createResult.providerDeploymentId);
1556:     } catch (error) {
1557:       const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
1558:       if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1559:         throw new QueueRetryError('Provider status endpoint is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1560:       }
1561:       throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1562:     }
1563:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1564:       workspaceId,
1565:       deploymentId,
1566:       eventType: 'deployment_provider_status',
1567:       payload: {
1568:         providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1569:         status: providerStatus.status,
1570:         deployedUrl: providerStatus.deployedUrl,
1571:       },
1572:     });
1573:   }
1574: 
1575:   if (providerStatus.status === 'queued' || providerStatus.status === 'running') {
1576:     if (cancelAccepted) {
1577:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1578:     }
1579:     if (providerStatus.errorCode === 'provider_probe_unknown') {
1580:       throw new QueueRetryError('Provider preview probe is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1581:     }
1582:     throw new PolicyError(
1583:       'provider_deploy_failed',
1584:       `Provider deployment did not reach terminal state within polling window (${maxPollAttempts} attempts)`
1585:     );
1586:   }
1587: 
1588:   if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {
1589:     throw new PolicyError(providerStatus.errorCode ?? 'provider_deploy_failed', providerStatus.errorMessage ?? 'Provider deployment failed');
1590:   }
1591: 
1592:   if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1593:     await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1594:     return;
1595:   }
1596: 
1597:   const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? createResult.deployedUrl;
1598:   if (!deployedUrl) {
1599:     throw new PolicyError('provider_deploy_failed', 'Provider deployment did not return a deployed URL');
1600:   }
1601: 
1602:   const finishedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1603:   const successResult = {
1604:     ...successResultTemplate,
1605:     url: deployedUrl,
1606:   };
1607: 
1608:   let markedSucceeded = await markWorkspaceDeploymentSucceededIfNotCancelled(env.DB, {
1609:     workspaceId,
1610:     deploymentId,
1611:     sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1612:     sourceBundleKey,
1613:     deployedUrl,
1614:     providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1615:     result: successResult,
1616:     finishedAt,
1617:   });
1618: 
1619:   if (!markedSucceeded) {
1620:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1621:     if (latest?.status === 'running' && latest.cancelRequestedAt && providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
1622:       const succeededUpdate = await env.DB
1623:         .prepare(
1624:           `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1625:            SET status = 'succeeded',
1626:                source_snapshot_sha256 = ?,
1627:                source_bundle_key = ?,
1628:                deployed_url = ?,
1629:                provider_deployment_id = ?,
1630:                cancel_requested_at = NULL,
1631:                    result_json = ?,
1632:                    error_code = NULL,
1633:                    error_message = NULL,
1634:                    finished_at = ?,
1635:                    duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END,
1636:                    updated_at = ?
1637:            WHERE id = ?
1638:              AND workspace_id = ?
1639:              AND status = 'running'
1640:              AND cancel_requested_at IS NOT NULL`
1641:         )
1642:         .bind(
1643:           sourceBundle.sha256,
1644:           sourceBundleKey,
1645:           deployedUrl,
1646:           createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1647:           JSON.stringify(successResult),
1648:           finishedAt,
1649:           finishedAt,
1650:           finishedAt,
1651:           deploymentId,
1652:           workspaceId
1653:         )
1654:         .run();
1655: 
1656:       if ((succeededUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
1657:         const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1658:         if (concurrent && concurrent.status !== 'running') {
1659:           return;
1660:         }
1661:         throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel-race success reconciliation lost state race; retry requested');
1662:       }
1663:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1664:         workspaceId,
1665:         deploymentId,
1666:         eventType: 'deployment_cancel_rejected',
1667:         payload: {
1668:           providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1669:           providerStatus: providerStatus.status,
1670:         },
1671:       });
1672:       markedSucceeded = true;
1673:     } else if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
1674:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1675:       return;
1676:     } else {
1677:       return;
1678:     }
1679:   }
1680: 
1681:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1682:     workspaceId,
1683:     deploymentId,
1684:     eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
1685:       payload: {
1686:         deployedUrl,
1687:         sourceBundleKey,
1688:         sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1689:       },
1690:     });
1691: 
1692:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1693:     deploymentId,
1694:     status: 'succeeded',
1695:     deployedUrl,
1696:     deployedAt: finishedAt,
1697:     errorCode: null,
1698:     errorMessage: null,
1699:   });
1700: }

1702: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(
1703:   env: Env,
1704:   workspaceId: string,
1705:   options?: Partial<DeploymentValidationOptions & DeploymentAutoFixOptions & DeploymentPublishOptions>
1706: ): Promise<{
1707:   ok: boolean;
1708:   toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null;
1709:   checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }>;
1710:   remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[];
1711: }> {
1712:   const checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }> = [];
1713:   const remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[] = [];
1714:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
1715:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
1716:     checks.push({ code: 'workspace_ready', ok: false, details: 'Workspace is not ready' });
1717:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1718:   }
1719:   checks.push({ code: 'workspace_ready', ok: true });
1720: 
1721:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, workspace.sandboxId);
1722:   const workspaceProjectRootRaw =
1723:     typeof workspace.sourceProjectRoot === 'string' && workspace.sourceProjectRoot.trim() ? workspace.sourceProjectRoot : '.';
1724:   let workspaceProjectRoot = '.';
1725:   try {
1726:     workspaceProjectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(workspaceProjectRootRaw);
1727:   } catch (error) {
1728:     checks.push({
1729:       code: 'project_root',
1730:       ok: false,
1731:       details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1732:     });
1733:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1734:   }
1735:   const autoFixBaseline = parseBoolean(options?.rehydrateBaseline, false);
1736:   const autoFixBootstrapToolchain = parseBoolean(options?.bootstrapToolchain, false);
1737:   const runBuildIfPresent = parseBoolean(options?.runBuildIfPresent, true);
1738:   const runTestsIfPresent = parseBoolean(options?.runTestsIfPresent, true);
1739:   const provider = options?.provider ?? getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(undefined, env);
1740:   const outputDir = parseString(options?.outputDir);
1741: 
1742:   if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
1743:     if (!outputDir) {
1744:       checks.push({
1745:         code: 'provider_invalid_output_dir',
1746:         ok: false,
1747:         details: 'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider',
1748:       });
1749:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1750:     }
1751: 
1752:     const effectiveOutputDir =
1753:       workspaceProjectRoot === '.' ? outputDir : normalizeProjectRoot(`${workspaceProjectRoot}/${outputDir}`);
1754:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_output_dir', ok: true, details: effectiveOutputDir });
1755:   }
1756: 
1757:   try {
1758:     await ensureWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
1759:     checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: true });
1760:   } catch (error) {
1761:     const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1762:     if (!autoFixBaseline) {
1763:       checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: false, details });
1764:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1765:     }
1766: 
1767:     const rehydrated = await tryRehydrateWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
1768:     if (!rehydrated) {
1769:       checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: false, details });
1770:       remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: false, details: 'auto-fix failed' });
1771:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1772:     }
1773:     remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: true });
1774:     checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: true, details: 'auto-fixed baseline rehydrate' });
1775:   }
1776: 
1777:   const scripts = await detectPackageScriptsInProjectRoot(sandbox, workspaceProjectRoot);
1778:   const shouldBootstrapForValidation =
1779:     autoFixBootstrapToolchain && ((runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild) || (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest));
1780:   checks.push({
1781:     code: 'detected_scripts',
1782:     ok: true,
1783:     details: JSON.stringify({ hasBuild: scripts.hasBuild, hasTest: scripts.hasTest }),
1784:   });
1785: 
1786:   const secrets = await detectPotentialSecrets(sandbox);
1787:   if (secrets.length > 0) {
1788:     checks.push({ code: 'secret_scan', ok: false, details: secrets.join(', ') });
1789:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1790:   }
1791:   checks.push({ code: 'secret_scan', ok: true });
1792: 
1793:   let toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile;
1794:   try {
1795:     toolchain = await detectWorkspaceToolchainProfile(
1796:       sandbox,
1797:       workspaceProjectRoot
1798:     );
1799:     checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_detect', ok: true, details: JSON.stringify(toolchain) });
1800:   } catch (error) {
1801:     checks.push({
1802:       code: 'toolchain_detect',
1803:       ok: false,
1804:       details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1805:     });
1806:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1807:   }
1808: 
1809:   if (shouldBootstrapForValidation) {
1810:     try {
1811:       await bootstrapToolchainIfNeeded(sandbox, toolchain);
1812:       checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrap', ok: true });
1813:       remediations.push({
1814:         code: 'toolchain_bootstrapped',
1815:         applied: toolchain.manager === 'pnpm' || toolchain.manager === 'yarn',
1816:       });
1817:     } catch (error) {
1818:       checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrap', ok: false, details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error) });
1819:       remediations.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrapped', applied: false });
1820:       return { ok: false, toolchain, checks, remediations };
1821:     }
1822:   } else {
1823:     checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrap', ok: true, details: 'skipped' });
1824:   }
1825: 
1826:   if ((runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild) || (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest)) {
1827:     const manager = managerBinary(toolchain);
1828:     const managerCheck = await sandbox.exec(`command -v ${manager} >/dev/null 2>&1`);
1829:     if (managerCheck.exitCode !== 0) {
1830:       checks.push({
1831:         code: 'validation_tooling',
1832:         ok: false,
1833:         details: `${manager} is not available in sandbox runtime`,
1834:       });
1835:       return { ok: false, toolchain, checks, remediations };
1836:     }
1837:   }
1838:   checks.push({ code: 'validation_tooling', ok: true });
1839: 
1840:   return { ok: true, toolchain, checks, remediations };
1841: }
1842: 
1843: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
1844:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1845:   if (!claimed) {
1846:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1847:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'queued' && existing.status !== 'running') {
1848:       try {
1849:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1850:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1851:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1852:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1853:         }
1854:       }
1855:       return;
1856:     }
1857: 
1858:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1859:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1860:       return;
1861:     }
1862: 
1863:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1864:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
1865:         const staleFailedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1866:         const staleErrorCode = existing.cancelRequestedAt
1867:           ? 'deployment_stale_timeout_cancel_pending'
1868:           : 'deployment_stale_timeout';
1869:         const staleErrorMessage = existing.cancelRequestedAt
1870:           ? 'Deployment execution exceeded stale timeout while cancellation was pending'
1871:           : 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery';
1872:         const staleFailedUpdate = await env.DB
1873:           .prepare(
1874:             `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1875:              SET status = 'failed',
1876:                  error_code = ?,
1877:                  error_message = ?,
1878:                  finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
1879:                  duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END,
1880:                  updated_at = ?
1881:              WHERE id = ?
1882:                AND workspace_id = ?
1883:                AND status = 'running'`
1884:           )
1885:           .bind(staleErrorCode, staleErrorMessage, staleFailedAt, staleFailedAt, staleFailedAt, deploymentId, workspaceId)
1886:           .run();
1887: 
1888:         if ((staleFailedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
1889:           throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment stale-timeout reconciliation lost state race; retry requested');
1890:         }
1891:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1892:           workspaceId,
1893:           deploymentId,
1894:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1895:           payload: {
1896:             code: staleErrorCode,
1897:             message: staleErrorMessage,
1898:           },
1899:         });
1900:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1901:           deploymentId,
1902:           status: 'failed',
1903:           errorCode: staleErrorCode,
1904:           errorMessage: staleErrorMessage,
1905:         });
1906:         return;
1907:       }
1908: 
1909:       if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1910:         if (!existing.providerDeploymentId) {
1911:           const hasProviderCreatedEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
1912:             env.DB,
1913:             workspaceId,
1914:             deploymentId,
1915:             'deployment_provider_created'
1916:           );
1917:           if (!hasProviderCreatedEvent) {
1918:             await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_provider_unknown');
1919:             return;
1920:           }
1921:         }
1922: 
1923:         if (existing.providerDeploymentId) {
1924:           try {
1925:             const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1926:             const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1927:             const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1928:             const providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(existing.providerDeploymentId);
1929: 
1930:             if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1931:               await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1932:               return;
1933:             }
1934: 
1935:             if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
1936:               if (!existing.sourceSnapshotSha256 || !existing.sourceBundleKey) {
1937:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment success metadata not yet available; retry requested');
1938:               }
1939:               const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? existing.deployedUrl ?? null;
1940:               if (!deployedUrl) {
1941:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Provider deployment succeeded but no deployed URL is available yet; retry requested');
1942:               }
1943:               const finishedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1944:               const existingResult =
1945:                 existing.result && typeof existing.result === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existing.result)
1946:                   ? (existing.result as Record<string, unknown>)
1947:                   : {};
1948:               const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1949:               const requestProvenance =
1950:                 requestPayload?.provenance && typeof requestPayload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(requestPayload.provenance)
1951:                   ? (requestPayload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
1952:                   : {};
1953:               const existingArtifact =
1954:                 existingResult.artifact && typeof existingResult.artifact === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existingResult.artifact)
1955:                   ? (existingResult.artifact as Record<string, unknown>)
1956:                   : {};
1957:               const existingProvenance =
1958:                 existingResult.provenance && typeof existingResult.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existingResult.provenance)
1959:                   ? (existingResult.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
1960:                   : {};
1961:               const successResult = {
1962:                 ...existingResult,
1963:                 url: deployedUrl,
1964:                 artifact: {
1965:                   sourceBundleKey: existing.sourceBundleKey,
1966:                   sourceSnapshotSha256: existing.sourceSnapshotSha256,
1967:                   outputBundleSha256:
1968:                     typeof existingArtifact.outputBundleSha256 === 'string' ? existingArtifact.outputBundleSha256 : null,
1969:                   outputDir: typeof existingArtifact.outputDir === 'string' ? existingArtifact.outputDir : null,
1970:                 },
1971:                 provenance: {
1972:                   ...existingProvenance,
1973:                   workspaceId,
1974:                   taskId:
1975:                     typeof requestProvenance.taskId === 'string'
1976:                       ? requestProvenance.taskId
1977:                       : (existingProvenance.taskId ?? null),
1978:                   operationId:
1979:                     typeof requestProvenance.operationId === 'string'
1980:                       ? requestProvenance.operationId
1981:                       : (existingProvenance.operationId ?? null),
1982:                   trigger:
1983:                     typeof requestProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1984:                       ? requestProvenance.trigger
1985:                       : typeof existingProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1986:                         ? existingProvenance.trigger
1987:                         : 'manual',
1988:                 },
1989:                 rollbackOnFailure: parseBoolean(requestPayload?.rollbackOnFailure, true),
1990:                 reconciled: true,
1991:                 fromCancelRequested: true,
1992:               };
1993:               const succeededUpdate = await env.DB
1994:                 .prepare(
1995:                   `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1996:                    SET status = 'succeeded',
1997:                        deployed_url = ?,
1998:                        provider_deployment_id = ?,
1999:                        source_snapshot_sha256 = ?,
2000:                        source_bundle_key = ?,
2001:                        cancel_requested_at = NULL,
2002:                         result_json = ?,
2003:                         error_code = NULL,
2004:                         error_message = NULL,
2005:                         finished_at = ?,
2006:                         duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END,
2007:                         updated_at = ?
2008:                    WHERE id = ?
2009:                      AND workspace_id = ?
2010:                      AND status = 'running'
2011:                      AND cancel_requested_at IS NOT NULL`
2012:                 )
2013:                 .bind(
2014:                   deployedUrl,
2015:                   existing.providerDeploymentId,
2016:                   existing.sourceSnapshotSha256,
2017:                   existing.sourceBundleKey,
2018:                   JSON.stringify(successResult),
2019:                   finishedAt,
2020:                   finishedAt,
2021:                   finishedAt,
2022:                   deploymentId,
2023:                   workspaceId
2024:                 )
2025:                 .run();
2026: 
2027:               if ((succeededUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
2028:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment reconciliation lost state race; retry requested');
2029:               }
2030:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2031:                 workspaceId,
2032:                 deploymentId,

parts.text:
- **Medium** `cloudflare_workers_assets` legacy deployment IDs can be marked failed even when provider reports success.  
  In `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deploy-provider.ts:706`, `getDeploymentStatus()` intentionally returns `{ status: 'succeeded', deployedUrl: null }` for legacy non-handle IDs (`isLegacyDeploymentId`). But `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1597` unconditionally throws `provider_deploy_failed` when `deployedUrl` is null.  
  This creates a rollout regression for in-flight/resumed deployments created before the new `deployment:` handle format: provider says succeeded, runner records failed.  
  **Suggested fix:** in runner success handling, allow `deployedUrl === null` for legacy provider IDs (or map to existing stored URL when present), matching the provider’s backward-compatibility contract.  

No other clear bugs stood out in the changed code paths.
